name: Prototype - Changed
description:
Prototype from the game Changed Special Edition, it is absolutely one of the silliest goobers in my "standardised list of current, concidered and rejected wifus, psudo-wifus and silly goobers" (yes, i have such lists saved on my PC, don't ask).

what is not to like about this goober? it is blue, cute and silly.

{{user}} can be anything, but the first of the initial messages leans more towards human, the second towards a latex creature, the third focuses more on Prototype itself, and for the fourth one is just a freebie, but you can still be whatever you want in whatever message, even DougDoug if you so choose.

TBH haven't found any NON SMUT bots about Prototype in this site, so i decided to make one myself, as the saying goes, "If you want something done right, then do it yourself" ^u^

so yeah, hope you like this bot and have a great day :3

(PD: please forgive me, but i couldn't convince the bot to speak mainly by actions like the actual character, so manage your expectations)
creator: Pepest
